title: ATLAS · Sector RRG snapshot
description: Sector Relative Rotation Graph data (frontend-v1 spec §3 Sector board, §4 Explore · Global sectors, §5 Explore · Country, §6 Explore · Sector). Produces the classic 4-quadrant rotation plot: x-axis = RS-Ratio (level), y-axis = RS-Momentum (rate of change). Quadrant derivation: leading (RS>100 & Mom>100), improving (RS<100 & Mom>100), weakening (RS>100 & Mom<100), lagging (RS<100 & Mom<100). Stage 2 source: `/api/v1/sectors/rrg`. RS values are normalised around 100 (100 = equal to benchmark).

data_as_of.description: Most recent trading session included in the RRG computation (ISO YYYY-MM-DD, IST).

examples: ATLAS Sector RRG engine — NSE index data via JIP

benchmark_id.description: Benchmark series used to compute each sector's relative strength. Default `NIFTY_500_TRI` per spec.

lookback_weeks.description: Lookback window (in weeks) used to compute RS-Ratio and RS-Momentum. Default 14 weeks — the classic RRG parameter.

universe_size_total.description: Optional total count of stocks across all sectors in the snapshot (sanity check against `sum(sectors[].universe_size)`).

sectors.description: One row per sector index. Typically 11 rows for the NSE sector family (Auto, Bank, Consumer Durables, Energy, Financial Services, FMCG, Healthcare, IT, Media, Metal, Pharma, PSU Bank, Realty — use the 11 load-bearing ones per spec §3).

sector_code.description: Alias for sector_slug — URL-safe slug for the sector.

sector_slug.description: URL-safe slug. Matches the universe pattern used elsewhere (e.g. `nifty_it` pairs with `sector:nifty_it` on breadth).

sector_name.description: Display name of the sector index.

rs_ratio.description: RS-Ratio (level). Normalised around 100: >100 = outperforming benchmark, <100 = underperforming. Up to 4 decimal places.

rs_momentum.description: RS-Momentum (rate of change of RS-Ratio). Normalised around 100: >100 = RS improving, <100 = RS deteriorating. Up to 4 decimal places.

quadrant.description: Derived quadrant. `leading` = RS>100 & Mom>100; `improving` = RS<100 & Mom>100; `weakening` = RS>100 & Mom<100; `lagging` = RS<100 & Mom<100. Boundary values (exactly 100) are classified conservatively toward the lower-performance quadrant.

universe_size.description: Number of constituent stocks in this sector index on `data_as_of`.

breadth_count_ema21.description: Optional count of constituents above their 21-EMA on `data_as_of`. Must satisfy `<= universe_size`. Enables Today/Sector-board breadth chip without a second API call.

breadth_count_dma200.description: Optional count of constituents above their 200-DMA on `data_as_of`. Must satisfy `<= universe_size`.

tail.description: Historical 8-week trajectory of RS-Ratio and RS-Momentum for the RRG tail path.

rs_composite.description: Optional 4-factor conviction chip composite (RS + Momentum + Volume + Breadth) used by the sector tile in spec §3. 0–100 scale.
